channel.title: Chart Breakers & Star Stories
channel.itunes:author: Family TVR
channel.itunes:summary: Did your favorite artist just break a record or a heart? The charts are screaming, and we have the inside story you won't hear anywhere else.
channel.description: The latest music trends, chart updates, and star stories from Billboard and beyond. Stay updated with the Pop Culture.

item.title: Sabrina Carpenter Brought Out Madonna for Coachella Weekend Two Performance
item.description:
[Intro music plays]
Host: Welcome to the latest music update. We're coming to you live from the world of Coachella, where something incredible just happened.
[Music transitions to a Coachella ambiance]
Host: Sabrina Carpenter's headlining set on Friday night just became one of the most unforgettable moments in Coachella history. And it's all thanks to a surprise appearance by the one and only Madonna.
[Sound clip of crowd cheering]
Host: The Queen of Pop crashed the stage during Carpenter's performance of "Juno", and the crowd went wild. Together, they performed a medley of Madonna's classic hit "Vogue" and even debuted an unreleased track, believed to be from Madonna's upcoming album, Confessions II.
[Sound clip of "Vogue" music]
Host: But that's not all - Madonna and Carpenter also performed "Like a Prayer" together, and Madonna took a moment to address the crowd. She reflected on her first Coachella performance 20 years ago and the significance of the evening, being the new moon of Taurus.
[Sound clip of Madonna speaking]
Host: This surprise appearance comes as Madonna prepares to release Confessions II, one of the most anticipated pop albums of the year. And for Sabrina Carpenter, it's a thrilling conclusion to her blockbuster run behind her 2024 album Short n' Sweet.
[Outro music plays]
Host: That's all for now. Thanks for tuning in to this special Coachella update. Stay tuned for more music news and updates. [Outro music continues to play]
